reviews.comment:
Excelente! Tiene mesitas para pasar un rato, tomar mates, almorzar o simplemente hacer una parada agradable entre la vegetación mientras cargan combustible. No tiene GNC. Los sanitarios muy aseados y el trato amable.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent! It has small tables where you can hang out, drink mate, have lunch, or simply take a pleasant break among the vegetation while you refuel. It doesn't have CNG. The restrooms are very clean, and the service is friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvaTV5MTNRRRAB
